title: RestroSuite dashboard reliability update
summary: This update improves billing clarity, import/export feedback, logo consistency, update safety, and background sync smoothness in the RestroSuite dashboard.
highlights: Bills now use date-wise numbers like RS-20260619-001.
Bill, tax, menu, inventory, and tenant exports use date-wise filenames.
Import and export work now shows a clear progress/status bar.
The dashboard checks for new updates in the background and prompts with guided release notes.
Current local dashboard data is saved before applying an update.
Inventory and Recipe Maker sync is safer for multi-branch/outlet data.
Pending-order sync is throttled so realtime updates do not repeatedly shake or refresh the desktop screen.
The RestroSuite dashboard sidebar now uses the real RestroSuite logo.
